metadata.description: Track feed latency, error rate, and Cosmos request units in App Insights.

json.text:
## Feed Performance
This workbook monitors the *p50/p95/p99* latencies, the error rate, and the telemetry-based Cosmos RU budget for `/api/feed`. Update the resource IDs below to your actual `appi-asora-dev` resource before importing.

json.title: Feed latency (p50/p95/p99)
json.subtitle: Latency percentiles every five minutes
json.query:
requests
| where url has "/api/feed"
| summarize p50=percentile(duration,50), p95=percentile(duration,95), p99=percentile(duration,99) by bin(timestamp, 5m)

json.title: Feed error rate
json.subtitle: Percentage of failed feed requests per five minutes
json.query:
requests
| where url has "/api/feed"
| summarize err_rate=100.0 * countif(success==false) / count() by bin(timestamp, 5m)

json.title: Cosmos RU per feed page
json.subtitle: Custom metric emitted from App Insights
json.query:
customMetrics
| where name == "cosmos_ru_feed_page"
| summarize avgRU=avg(value), p95RU=percentile(value,95) by bin(timestamp, 5m)

json.title: feed_page event – feed type distribution and pagination depth
json.subtitle: Custom event emitted on every feed request; breakdowns by feed type and hasMore
json.query:
customEvents
| where name == "feed_page"
| extend feedType = tostring(customDimensions["feed.type"]),
         hasMore   = tobool(customDimensions["hasMore"]),
         itemCount = toint(customDimensions["count"])
| summarize requests=count(), avgItems=avg(itemCount) by feedType, bin(timestamp, 5m)

json.title: Feed p95 latency vs 200 ms ADR target
json.subtitle: p95 must stay below 200 ms per ADR-001; red reference line at 200 ms
json.query:
requests
| where url has "/api/feed"
| summarize p95=percentile(duration,95) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| extend target_ms=200
| project timestamp, p95, target_ms
